source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the CH- 2 and CH-1 Zones Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the CH- 2 and CH-1 Zones Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the CH- 2 and CH-1 Zones Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within a CH-2 or CH-1 zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22) Number of Dwelling Units

sections.title_label_raw: The number of cluster housing dwelling units shall not exceed:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The number of cluster housing dwelling units shall not exceed:
provisions.text: The number of cluster housing dwelling units shall not exceed:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The number of cluster housing dwelling units shall not exceed:
provisions.text: 6 per cluster housing block; and (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The number of cluster housing dwelling units shall not exceed:

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 239(2), any portion of a main building,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 239(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 239(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 239(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: If a minimum required front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
provisions.text: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall be 1.25 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 6.0

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 6.0
provisions.text: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 6.0 metres. Additional Siting Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0

provisions.heading_context_raw: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0
provisions.text: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0 metres, one main building shall be required to be located within 8.0 metres of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0
provisions.text: the front or flanking lot line; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0
provisions.text: where a transportation or utility easement abuts the streetline and has a depth greater than 8.0 metres, the edge of the easement that is located farthest from the streetline.

provisions.heading_context_raw: On a lot with continuous frontage that is greater than 12.0
provisions.text: A new main building is not required to meet the requirements of Subsection 242(1), providing there is an existing main building on the lot that satisfies Subsection 242(1). Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 243(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 243(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 243(2), the maximum required lot coverage is 50%. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 243(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Minimum Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in
provisions.text: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in Subsection 89(3), a minimum required separation distance of 2.0 metres shall be provided between main buildings. Accessory Structures

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter
provisions.text: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
